required.fact: SoloGK is a UK-based goalkeeper-glove brand focused on professional performance at accessible prices.
Its product architecture includes Eclipse, Lunar, Vortex, Cobra, and Viper collections.
The public shop lists about 20 actual product items and these must be separated from collection/category names.
Visible featured prices span GBP 25 to GBP 40.
Contact latex and wet/dry grip are central product differentiators.
Lunar 2 trades durability for elite performance.

important.fact: The company addresses both experienced keepers and buyers who need glove-selection guidance.

must_not_claim: SoloGK has strong independent customer proof.
GBP 25 to GBP 40 represents every product price on the site.
Collection names such as Lunar, Vortex, Cobra, Eclipse, or Viper are individual products.
